The founder of LangChain is **Harrison Chase**. He is the co-founder and CEO of LangChain, an open-source framework designed to help developers build applications using large language models (LLMs). Chase co-founded LangChain in 2022, aiming to address challenges developers faced in creating reliable LLM applications by providing a standardized, flexible toolkit. He is also known for his work in AI and machine learning, with a background in statistics and computer science from Harvard University.
